title: Return to Point of Origin * Homeless Youth - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Transportation > Return to Point of Origin * Homeless Youth 1 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Homeless Youth urn to Point of Origin Homeless Youth Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF NATIONAL RUNAWAY SAFELINE HOME FREE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides bus tickets via Greyhound to transport eligible individuals from where they currently are to a location where family or a safe adult is. Locations must be accessible by Greyhound transportation services. 4849 N Milwaukee Avenue Suite 700 Chicago, IL 60630 Eligibility: Ages 12-21 who are away from home and do not have a safe way to return Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (800) 786-2929 1-800 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
